title: Build the Express body parser wrappers in a fresh repo (v2)
prompt: Build the body parser behavior from the visible public spec. This fresh repo slice is intentionally wider than the urlencoded-only task: implement the JSON and urlencoded wrappers so the public tests pass, while deeper wrapper semantics remain in follow-up checks.
golden_patch_description: Implement JSON and urlencoded body parsing behavior for the fresh Express slice, leaving only deeper nested-array semantics for follow-up checks.
instance_notes: Public-repair stress slice: visible JSON + extended urlencoded coverage, hidden nested-array follow-up, tests-only verify to avoid framework false positives.
